specs.title: 失败策略流水线与生产级退避

drifts.expected: Every supervised unit completion enters the fixed six-stage policy pipeline, every minimum exit kind is classified, each stage leaves an auditable record point, and automatic restart cannot bypass the pipeline.
drifts.actual: SupervisionPipeline exists, but RuntimeControlState handles exits by refreshing restart limits, calculating restart decisions, and executing restarts directly. The pipeline execute action remains a placeholder.
drifts.recommended_resolution: Route the real child-exit automatic policy path through SupervisionPipeline::execute_pipeline, implement execute action, classify all required exit kinds, and emit one ordered diagnostic per pipeline stage.

drifts.expected: MeltdownTracker state is separated by child, group, and supervisor scope. Local verdicts map onto the protection ladder, and events include scopes_triggered and lead_scope.
drifts.actual: MeltdownTracker stores one aggregate queue per conceptual layer and records each child failure into all three queues. Event emission does not populate scopes_triggered or lead_scope.
drifts.recommended_resolution: Key meltdown state by ChildId, group_id, and supervisor instance. Map each local verdict to ProtectionAction, choose lead_scope only among equally strict effective verdicts, and populate event fields on the real pipeline event.

drifts.expected: Production restart throttling supports full jitter, decorrelated jitter, max concurrent restarts, cold start budget, hot loop detection, and reproducible test mode.
drifts.actual: The algorithms and gate types exist, but the real control loop only maps child backoff config into BackoffPolicy::new with jitter disabled by default. ColdStartBudget, HotLoopDetector, and CombinedThrottleGate are not used by the real restart path.
drifts.recommended_resolution: Connect jitter modes, concurrent gates, cold start budget, and hot loop detection into evaluate budget, decide action, and execute action. Fix throttle_gate_owner serialization to match the contract.

drifts.expected: 100 percent of fixed failure samples can be reconciled with the six-stage pipeline order from events or diagnostics.
drifts.actual: The pipeline-order test sends a single event through ObservabilityPipeline and leaves TODO comments for real six-stage diagnostics.
drifts.recommended_resolution: Drive the production runtime or SupervisionPipeline in acceptance tests and assert the ordered six-stage diagnostic stream.

drifts.expected: Group isolation tests prove other groups can still complete controlled restart attempts after one group trips protection.
drifts.actual: The tests simulate group isolation with separate MeltdownTracker instances and do not validate a single supervisor instance with keyed group state.
drifts.recommended_resolution: Use one supervisor tree with multiple groups and validate restart attempts and meltdown fields through production events.

drifts.expected: Concurrent restart pressure samples prove the peak never exceeds the declared limit and excess attempts appear as queue or delay diagnostics.
drifts.actual: The concurrent throttle test uses a local simulated gate and checks a serialization value that conflicts with the contract.
drifts.recommended_resolution: Replace the local gate simulation with CombinedThrottleGate or a full runtime test and assert contract-compliant queue diagnostics and throttle owner strings.

drifts.expected: The acceptance fixture computes CV_jitter_strategy / CV_fixed_baseline >= 1.3 using generated next_wait samples for full jitter or decorrelated jitter.
drifts.actual: The jitter test uses hand-written samples and local pseudo-random values, treats a zero-CV fixed baseline as trivial, and does not call production BackoffPolicy jitter paths.
drifts.recommended_resolution: Generate next_wait sequences through production BackoffPolicy, define a non-trivial fixed baseline or amend the contract baseline, and assert the required 1.3 CV ratio.

task_state_mismatches.issue: US1 implementation tasks are marked complete, but the real control loop does not enter the supervision pipeline and execute action remains placeholder logic.
US2 implementation tasks are marked complete, but meltdown state is not keyed by child or group and event emission does not fill scopes_triggered or lead_scope.
US3 implementation tasks are marked complete, but cold start budget, hot loop detection, concurrent gates, and production jitter modes are not wired into the runtime restart path.

notes: This report is scoped to 005-1-failure-policy-reliability only.
Other feature code was not counted as unspecced code in this scoped run.
